blocks.content: It was a girl from Millhaven who lit the fuse. Not maliciously — she'd just seen the photo on Facebook. Kit and Cassidy at the party, her hand on his arm mid-conversation, both of them laughing at something. The kind of photo that looked like nothing and could be made into something.
She texted Daisy on a Tuesday afternoon.
hey!! saw something on FB thought you should see
The photo came through a second later. Daisy looked at it for a long time.
isn't that kit? who's the girl lol
She put the phone face-down on her desk. Picked it back up. Looked at the photo again. Cassidy's hand on his arm. His face turned toward her, grinning at something.
She thought about the Thursday call. The pause when she mentioned Jordan. The way Kit had said yeah, she was there — like it was casual, like it was nothing.
someone sent me a photo. from the party friday
you and cassidy. becca hensley saw it on facebook
it's not what it looks like
She stared at that sentence. Of all the things he could have said.
